extra.reason: Phase 1 done; _auth pathless layout deferred to Phase 2 (requires child routes to be registered by plugin)
RouterProvider swapped to TSR; react-router-dom removed; 22 files migrated via router/compat shim. Build + typecheck pass. Runtime smoke deferred to user.

All 5 pages (Settings, Search, Activity, Discover, Library + useLibraryGames) converted to Route.useSearch + validateSearch Zod schemas. Shim's useSearchParams has no consumers; full e2e smoke passes 18/18.

MobileNav Games/General NavItems now use search: { tab: undefined } + activeOptions: { explicitUndefined: true } so base items don't light up when a sibling tab is active. TSR Link default includeSearch=true + explicitUndefined gives clean tab-aware active state without the shim. MainLayout NavDropdown triggers intentionally stay active on any tab within their basePath (Library/Settings trigger remains lit in /?tab=scan).

Verification pass complete. tsc --noEmit clean; bun run build produces 272 modules / 42 VFS files / 825.6 KB; autoCodeSplitting emits per-route chunks (_auth, setup, login, register, activity, discover, search, settings, updates, game._platform._slug — plus route-component split). Playwright: 27/28 pass (only fail is pre-existing 'setup redirects to home if already completed' tracked in gamearr-agg). Bundle delta vs pre-migration: react-vendor 207 -> 228 KB (+21 KB raw / ~6 KB gzip) for TSR runtime. Manual smoke items deferred (need browser): view-transition animation quality, back/forward nav, hover-preload timing.

Loaders added to Discover (popularityTypes), Activity (downloads list), Updates (pending), Login + Register (auth.status). Settings kept loader-less — its useSetting queries are per-key and don't share a primary fetch. Setup loader not needed. Combined with defaultPreload='intent', hovering any TSR Link now pre-warms the target page's primary query.
GameCard's onMouseEnter now only prefetches releases; bySlug is handled by the /_auth/game/$platform/$slug loader via defaultPreload='intent'.

scrollRestoration: true, defaultPreloadStaleTime: 30_000 (reuse hover-preload data on click), plus the default error/pending/notFound components. Route-scoped hook adoption was already landed piece-meal in Phase 3.

router/boundaries.tsx provides defaultErrorComponent / defaultPendingComponent / defaultNotFoundComponent on the router. Every route inherits them; bad slugs, loader throws, and unmatched paths now have a consistent fallback with a retry + 'back home' link.

Implemented as a route-level beforeLoad on /setup that fetches setup-status directly (bypassing the Query cache via cache: 'no-store') and throws redirect({ to: '/' }) when isComplete=true. Runs correctly in isolation (the target 'setup redirects to home if already completed' e2e now passes on its own). Full setup.spec sequence still shows 1 flake on that test — trace analysis shows the backend returns isComplete=false on the second /setup fetch despite the prior skip mutation persisting setup_skipped=true, which points at a test-infra / DB-sharing issue rather than a router bug. Leaving intent in code; follow-up would need to reproduce the backend inconsistency directly, possibly via a dedicated test DB per run.
